title: taraxacum rupicola
intro: Taraxacum rupicola, also known as rock dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum rupicola include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal disorders.
